description: Routing variant: balanced (as_of 2026-07-11). Frontier reasoning where wrong calls cost the most (plan, minimality, orchestration), an open-weight code-specialized executor for the diff, a different-family reviewer. Paste this object over the model_routing section of your quality-loop.config.json, then run setup-models and check-config. See assets/routing/README.md for the dated model menu and swap guidance.

code_specialized.note: Fallback implementer when the droid leg is unavailable.
Bulk executor. Open-weight GLM via Factory; see README for supply-risk note and non-Chinese fallbacks.

strong_reasoning.note: Reviewer leg. Reviews stay advisory beneath deterministic gates; verify findings locally (see README).

main_session.note: Implementer runs on the droid leg; declared here for the cross-host heterogeneity check.
